---
title: "Jessica Benun's Portfolio"
author: "Jessica Benun"
date: today
format:
  html:
    theme: simplex
    css: styles.css
    toc: true
---
Welcome to my Quarto website. Here, you can explore my projects, learn about my background, and find ways to contact me. I am passionate about leveraging data and analytics to drive insights and make informed decisions. Feel free to browse through the different sections to learn more about my work and experience.
